macro.title: Higher Mortgage Rates Push Pending Home Sales Down for Second Straight Week
macro.what: Some would-be homebuyers are hesitating as housing costs rise and the ongoing Iran war makes the economy feel shaky
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 29% of U.S. Homebuyers Paid Cash in March–the Lowest Share For That Month Since 2020
macro.what: With hundreds of thousands more home sellers than buyers in the market, fewer house hunters feel inclined to make cash offers to stand out in bidding wars
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Remain Tied to Iran War, Oil Prices
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Three months in, the Iran war is still driving rates more than economic data
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: The Income Needed to Afford a Home Declined For Seventh Straight Month in April
macro.what: Homebuying affordability improved slightly in April because mortgage rates declined while incomes rose
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: New home sales fall, but the trend is still sideways
housing.what: Monthly numbers can swing wildly, but new home sales have been stuck for many years in a range that doesn’t show any real growth.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Homebuyer affordability slips in April as median mortgage payment rises to $2,152
housing.what: MBA’s April 2026 PAPI shows homebuyer affordability slipped month over month as median payments rose to $2,152.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Fair housing groups sue CFPB, Vought over ECOA fair lending rule
housing.what: Fair housing groups sued the CFPB and Russell Vought, seeking to block Regulation B changes ending disparate impact and limiting SPCPs.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: MasterBrand completes all-stock merger with American Woodmark
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: LadderUp expands rent-to-homeownership model
housing.what: LadderUp Housing is expanding its reach into Allegheny and Westmoreland counties, using an investment to acquire homes.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Investor Home Purchases Fall to Lowest Level Since 2020
housing.what: Elevated housing costs, a slower-than-usual housing market and a cooling rental market are squeezing potential returns for U.S
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: How Designers and Real Estate Pros Use Facebook Marketplace to Add Character to a Home
housing.what: Interior designers and real estate experts are turning to Facebook Marketplace, thrift stores, and estate sales to find one-of-a-kind pieces that add personality and warmth to a home
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Bank of America extends Community Homeownership Commitment program
notables.what: Bank of America will continue its program after $15B in loans and $600M in grants for 57,000 homebuyers since 2019.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Wells Fargo to offer 50-bps incentive for ICON 3D-printed homes
notables.what: Wells Fargo has reached an agreement with construction technology company ICON to serve as the preferred lender for its new 3D-printed residential properties.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Felicia Grumet on why the best career moves often feel uncomfortable
notables.what: Felicia Grumet, CFO of Newrez, reflects on leadership, career reinvention and why stepping outside your comfort zone can create the strongest opportunities for growth.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NAR REACH taps real estate firms for tech program
notables.what: The REACH program focuses on identifying and accelerating technology companies serving the residential real estate industry.
